ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Degree level (e.g., PhD, MS) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the project started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the project ended */,
  "expected_completion_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of project completion */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on-hold) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount for the project */,
  "ethics_approval_status" TEXT /* Status of ethics approval (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "ethics_approval_date" TEXT /* Date of ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_funding_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("funding_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the supervisor */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the supervisor (e.g., Dr, Prof) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supervisor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the supervisor */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university where the supervisor is affiliated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the supervisor is affiliated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supervisors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supervisors_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university where the student is enrolled */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the student is enrolled */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university where the department is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that offers the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the log entry belongs to */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event or milestone */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event or milestone */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "funding_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., government, private, university) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethics_approvals" (
  "ethics_approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethics approval */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the ethics approval belongs to */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of ethics approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of ethics approval (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "approval_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the ethics approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethics_approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ethics_approvals_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_deliverables" (
  "project_deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project deliverable */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the deliverable belongs to */,
  "deliverable_name" TEXT /* Name of the deliverable */,
  "deliverable_description" TEXT /* Description of the deliverable */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the deliverable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deliverable (e.g., completed, in-progress, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_deliverables_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "project_milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "milestone_description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., completed, in-progress, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
